Bash(git init && cat > .gitignore << 'EOF'
node_modules
dist
.DS_Store
.env
out
EOF
git add -A && git commit -m "Initial commit: Remotion AI reel template \(prompt-to-video base\)")
Bash(gh repo create reel-maker --public --description "AI-powered TikTok/Reels video generator built on Remotion" --source /Users/sarthakagrawal/Desktop/my-video --push 2>&1)

Bash(ls /Users/sarthakagrawal/Desktop/my-video/node_modules/@types/yargs 2>&1 && bun add -d @types/yargs 2>&1 | tail -5I was having issues running this SDK. Can you check whether it is runnable and do testing also?)

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: TikTok-style word captions, Flux images, Vercel AI SDK gateway

- Replace 14-char subtitle chunking with word-level caption sync using
  @remotion/captions + createTikTokStyleCaptions — active word highlights
  yellow as it's spoken \(TikTok karaoke style\)
- Swap DALL-E 3 → Flux Pro via fal.ai \(better portrait images, ~4x cheaper\)
- Replace openaiStructuredCompletion + setApiKey global state with Vercel AI
  SDK generateObject — supports OpenAI and Anthropic via --provider flag,
  auto-detects from which API key is set in env
- Remove non-deterministic Math.random\(\) from timeline generation entirely
- Add FAL_KEY env var; update .env.example with all three required keys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
chore: add regen-timeline script, update demo timeline to new format

scripts/regen-timeline.ts regenerates timeline.json from descriptor.json
for all stories in public/content/ — useful after schema changes.
Updated history-of-venus timeline to new word-level captions format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add Modal image generation \(FLUX.1-schnell, ~$0.002/image\)

modal/image_gen.py — Modal web endpoint wrapping FLUX.1-schnell on A10G.
Model weights are cached in a Modal Volume so the download only happens
once at deploy time. Cold start loads from volume into GPU memory.

CLI auto-selects provider by checking env vars in priority order:
  MODAL_IMAGE_GEN_URL → Modal \(cheapest\)
  FAL_KEY             → fal.ai Flux Pro
  neither             → interactive prompt with provider choice

--image-provider fal|modal flag overrides auto-detection.
Updated .env.example with setup notes for both providers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add Google Gemini as AI provider option

- Add @ai-sdk/google \(pinned to v1 to match ai@4.x\)
- createModel\(\) now supports "google" → gemini-2.0-flash default
- CLI auto-detects GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY \(priority: Anthropic > Google > OpenAI\)
- --provider flag now accepts openai | anthropic | google
- Updated .env.example

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://sarthakagrawal927--reel-maker-fluxgenerator-generate.modal.run \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\

Bash(python3 -c "
import json, base64
with open\('/tmp/modal_response.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
if 'image_b64' in data:
    img = base64.b64decode\(data['image_b64']\)
    with open\('/tmp/test_modal.png', 'wb'\) as f:
        f.write\(img\)
    print\('Success - image size:', len\(img\), 'bytes'\)
else:
    print\('Error:', json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, urllib.error, json

url = 'https://sarthakagrawal927--reel-maker-fluxgenerator-generate.modal.run'
data = json.dumps\({'prompt': 'sunset', 'width': 512, 'height': 512, 'steps': 4}\).encode\(\)
req = urllib.request.Request\(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='POST'\)

import socket
socket.setdefaulttimeout\(15\)

try:
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
    print\('Status:', resp.status\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\('HTTPError:', e.code, e.reason\)
    print\('Headers:', dict\(e.headers\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('Error:', type\(e\).__name__, e\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, urllib.error, json, socket
socket.setdefaulttimeout\(20\)

url = 'https://sarthakagrawal927--reel-maker-fluxgenerator-generate.modal.run'
data = json.dumps\({'prompt': 'sunset', 'width': 512, 'height': 512, 'steps': 4}\).encode\(\)
req = urllib.request.Request\(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='POST'\)

try:
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
    print\('OK:', resp.read\(\).decode\(\)[:200]\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\('Status:', e.code\)
    print\('Body:', e.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('Error:', type\(e\).__name__, e\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, urllib.error, json, socket
socket.setdefaulttimeout\(20\)
url = 'https://sarthakagrawal927--reel-maker-fluxgenerator-generate.modal.run'
data = json.dumps\({'prompt': 'sunset', 'width': 512, 'height': 512, 'steps': 4}\).encode\(\)
req = urllib.request.Request\(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='POST'\)
try:
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
    print\('OK'\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\('Status:', e.code, 'CallId:', e.headers.get\('Modal-Function-Call-Id','?'\)\)
    print\('Body:', e.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
except Exception as ex:
    print\('Exception:', ex\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, urllib.error, json, socket
socket.setdefaulttimeout\(300\)

url = 'https://sarthakagrawal927--reel-maker-fluxgenerator-generate.modal.run'
data = json.dumps\({'prompt': 'sunset mountains', 'width': 512, 'height': 512, 'steps': 4}\).encode\(\)
req = urllib.request.Request\(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='POST'\)

import time
print\('Sending request...', flush=True\)
t = time.time\(\)
try:
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
    body = resp.read\(\)
    result = json.loads\(body\)
    print\(f'Success in {time.time\(\)-t:.1f}s, image_b64 length:', len\(result.get\('image_b64',''\)\)\)
    with open\('/tmp/test_modal.png', 'wb'\) as f:
        import base64
        f.write\(base64.b64decode\(result['image_b64']\)\)
    print\('Saved to /tmp/test_modal.png'\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\(f'HTTP {e.code} after {time.time\(\)-t:.1f}s'\)
    print\('Body:', e.read\(\).decode\(\)[:500]\)
except Exception as ex:
    print\(f'Error after {time.time\(\)-t:.1f}s:', ex\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, urllib.error, json, socket, time, base64
socket.setdefaulttimeout\(300\)
url = 'https://sarthakagrawal927--reel-maker-fluxgenerator-generate.modal.run'
data = json.dumps\({'prompt': 'sunset over mountains', 'width': 512, 'height': 512, 'steps': 4}\).encode\(\)
req = urllib.request.Request\(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='POST'\)
t = time.time\(\)
print\('Sending...', flush=True\)
try:
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
    result = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\)
    img = base64.b64decode\(result['image_b64']\)
    open\('/tmp/test_modal.png','wb'\).write\(img\)
    print\(f'Success in {time.time\(\)-t:.1f}s — {len\(img\)} bytes saved to /tmp/test_modal.png'\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\(f'HTTP {e.code} in {time.time\(\)-t:.1f}s:', e.read\(\).decode\(\)[:200]\)
except Exception as ex:
    print\(f'Error in {time.time\(\)-t:.1f}s:', ex\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json, time
url = 'https://sarthakagrawal927--reel-maker-serve.modal.run/tts'
body = json.dumps\({'text': 'Hello world.'}\).encode\(\)
req = urllib.request.Request\(url, data=body, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='POST'\)
print\('Sending request...'\)
t0 = time.time\(\)
with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=120\) as resp:
    print\(f'Status: {resp.status} in {time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s'\)
    d = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\)
    print\('audio_b64 length:', len\(d.get\('audio_b64',''\)\)\)
    print\('characters[:10]:', d.get\('characters',[]\)[:10]\)
" 2>&1)

import urllib.request, json, time
